---
title: "On the interfacial lithium dynamics in Li7La3Zr2O12: poly (ethylene oxide)(LiTFSI) composite polymer-ceramic solid electrolytes under strong polymer phase confinement"
author: ["Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Fabián A. García Daza", "Henry A Cortés", "Javier Carrasco", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2022-10-01
publication: "Journal of colloid and interface science, **623**, 870–882 (2022)."
categories: ["SSBs"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcis.2022.05.069
url_preprint:
journ: "ACS Applied Materials & Interface"
issue: 623
page: 870–882
year: 2022
image: featured.png
pub_number: 8
---
